节点.功能描述: Provides the capabilities and methods for obtaining Short Message Service (SMS) management objects.

Splits a long SMS message into multiple fragments.

If the length of an SMS message exceeds the maximum length allowed (140 bytes), the SMS message is split into multiple segments for processing. which can be combined into a complete SMS message; Returns an empty string if no permission is granted or the short message content is {@code null}. Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { string } content - Indicates the short message content, which cannot be {@code null}.
@param { AsyncCallback<Array<string>> } callback - Indicates the callback for getting a list of split segments,

@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified. 2.
@throws { BusinessError } 8300002 - Operation failed. Cannot connect to service.

节点.功能描述:
Creates an SMS message instance based on the protocol data unit (PDU) and the specified SMS protocol.

After receiving the original PDU data, the system creates an SMS message instance according to the specified SMS protocol. SMS, and the value {@code 3gpp2} indicates CDMA/LTE SMS. returns {@code null} if {@code pdu} is empty or {@code specification} is not supported. Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { Array<number> } pdu - Indicates the original data, which is obtained from the received SMS.
@param { string } specification - Indicates the SMS protocol type. The value {@code 3gpp} indicates GSM/UMTS/LTE
@param { AsyncCallback<ShortMessage> } callback - Indicates the callback for getting an SMS message instance;
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified. 2.
@throws { BusinessError } 8300002 - Operation failed. Cannot connect to service.

parameters.说明: Indicates the original data, which is obtained from the received SMS.
Indicates the SMS protocol type. The value {@code 3gpp} indicates GSM/UMTS/LTE
Indicates the callback for getting an SMS message instance;

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified. 2.
Operation failed. Cannot connect to service.
